subject: 📢 Important: New Platform Features & Guidelines
body:
Hello,

We are excited to share some major updates to OMAHCONNECT! We have launched a new job-matching algorithm that improves recommendations by 30%, alongside enhanced portfolio security rules.

Please log in and review your updated profile dashboards.

Best regards,
OMAHCONNECT Administration Team
